mapper.select: /* adm-role-centerbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - selectTAdminMstCt */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,CTKEY ,CTNM FROM TADMIN_MST_CT WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y'

/* adm-role-centerbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - selectCenterByRole */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,B.CTKEY ,A.CTNM ,B.ROKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_CT A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ROXCTGT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY WHERE A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' AND B.ROKEY = #{rokey}
